top_signals.title: The Three AImigos versus The Magnificent Seven
top_signals.summary: Attention Markets Hypothesis > Efficient Markets Hypothesis
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Nomura Joins Sony in Powering Big Week for Japan Bond Sales
top_signals.summary: Nomura Holdings Inc. and Sony Group Corp. pushed bond sales by Japanese firms in global markets to more than $8 billion in the first two days of the week, in what is already one of the busiest periods for such deals this year, with more issuance likely.

top_signals.title: Musk’s SpaceX Adds Billions in Debt While Cutting Interest Costs
top_signals.summary: Elon Musk is no stranger to financial alchemy. His latest feat: adding billions of dollars of debt onto his cash-burning business empire while simultaneously cutting its annual interest burden.
